text.title: EU Sovereign LLM Deployment Bundle Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying eu-sovereign-llm-deployment-bundle must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: Any region outside EEA in `regions` for inference or storage.
Provider sub-processor list reaches a non-EEA jurisdiction without SCC + TIA.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
